untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'bullish consensus' sentiment percentile readings which are not available in the allowed indicator set. India_vix used as proxy for sentiment extremes, but true sentiment survey data is unavailable. 'Fundamental analysis confirmation' and 'market timing indicator' are too vague and cannot be operationalized without specific indicator names.
translation_notes: Mapped sentiment extremes (>70th or <30th percentile) to india_vix extremes as a volatility/fear proxy. Used RSI for momentum confirmation instead of unspecified 'primary filters'. Entry on pivot crossover approximates 'recent support/resistance penetration'. Stop loss set at 1 ATR equivalent (1.0%). Take profit mapped to exit when momentum reverses (RSI extreme normalization). Time stop set to 5 bars as specified.
